sudo tar -xzf apoorva_driver_autosetup.tar.gz -C /

To Create Device Node Manually
sudo insmod ApoorvaPciDriver.ko

sudo mknod /dev/APOORVA1553 c 236 0
sudo chmod 666 /dev/APOORVA1553

sudo ./DEMO
To Copy .a or .o files in usr/lib

sudo cp libApoorva31Rts_4NodeDll.a /usr/lib
sudo cp libApoorva31Rts_4NodeDll.o /usr/lib
Apoorva PMC

00: b5 10 50 90 00 01 00 02 02 00 00 ff 00 20 00 00
10: 00 00 00 f7 01 e4 00 00 01 e0 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 08 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 07 01 00 00

00: b5 10 50 90 00 00 00 02 02 00 00 ff 00 00 00 00
10: 00 00 00 f0 01 20 00 00 01 24 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 08 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff 01 00 00
Before Installation
00: b5 10 50 90 00 00 00 02 02 00 00 ff 00 00 00 00
10: 00 00 00 f0 01 20 00 00 01 24 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 08 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff 01 00 00
After Installation
00: b5 10 50 90 03 00 00 02 02 00 00 ff 00 00 00 00
10: 00 00 00 f0 01 20 00 00 01 24 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 08 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff 01 00 00

00: b5 10 50 90 03 00 00 02 02 00 00 ff 00 00 00 00
10: 00 00 00 f0 01 20 00 00 01 24 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 08 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff 01 00 00

DDC PMC

00: b5 10 50 90 00 00 00 02 02 00 00 ff 00 00 00 00
10: 00 00 00 f0 01 20 00 00 01 24 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff 01 00 00

00: b5 10 50 90 00 00 00 02 02 00 00 ff 00 00 00 00
10: 00 00 00 f0 01 20 00 00 01 24 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff 01 00 00

00: b5 10 50 90 00 01 00 02 02 00 00 ff 00 20 00 00
10: 00 00 00 f7 01 e4 00 00 01 e0 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 07 01 00 00


APOORVA PCI
00: b5 10 50 90 03 01 80 02 02 00 80 06 00 00 00 00
10: 00 00 80 f7 01 e1 00 00 00 00 00 f7 01 e0 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 07 01 00 00

00: b5 10 50 90 03 01 80 02 02 00 80 06 00 00 00 00
10: 00 00 80 f7 01 e1 00 00 00 00 00 f7 01 e0 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b5 10 50 90
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 07 01 00 00
